_comment: Furigana/ruby layout settings. Resource packs can override this file at assets/rubi/ruby_settings.json to tweak how ruby annotations are laid out. Values reload when resource packs change.
_fields: text_scale = base text scale (1.0 = don't shift), ruby_scale = furigana scale relative to base, ruby_overlap = furigana overlap with base (positive = closer/overlaps, negative = gap above base), y_offset = extra vertical shift in pixels for the whole ruby composition (positive = down)
